vBRIEFInfo.description: Restore the three #359 behaviors in the deterministic-question flow driven by skills/deft-directive-interview/SKILL.md.

plan.title: Deterministic questions (RC2): confirm step, back nav, escape hatch distinct from Other

narratives.Problem: RC2 testing off phase2/vbrief-cutover (HEAD 032ac87) shows all three #359 behaviors broken: (1) number keys instant-accept without a confirm-before-advance step; (2) no back-navigation affordance between deterministic questions; (3) the escape hatch Other.. is visually indistinguishable from Other and is not in slot 0.
narratives.Action: Edit skills/deft-directive-interview/SKILL.md (and the mirrored .agents/skills/deft-directive-interview/SKILL.md) to: (1) insert a confirm-after-number-press step where the agent echoes the selected option and waits for Enter before advancing; (2) add a back-navigation affordance (e.g. b or left-arrow) with a visible hint in the prompt footer; (3) rename the escape hatch to Discuss with agent (or similar) and move it to slot 0 with a distinct label; (4) add a persistent one-line legend under each question (Enter confirm / b back / 0 discuss).
narratives.Test: Update tests/content/test_skills.py or add new deterministic-question content tests asserting presence of confirm step, back-nav key, and slot-0 discuss option in the interview SKILL.md. If RC fixture walkthroughs exist, update the expected transcripts.
narratives.Outcome: A fresh RC install run off cutover branch demonstrates all three #359 behaviors: a number keypress shows the selection and awaits Enter; b returns to the previous question; slot 0 opens freeform conversation, visually distinct from Other.

items.title: Add back-navigation affordance (b key / left-arrow) with visible footer hint
Rename escape hatch to Discuss with agent and move to slot 0
Add persistent one-line legend under each deterministic question
Update tests/content/test_skills.py assertions for confirm / back / slot-0 / legend
